PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-07-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Faye Bresler for Bonnie Stensler (Petitioner).

The Court stated that everything was in order, that proof of holographic instrumnet was filed on June 9, 2008, that probate code 8221 was met and that the will was being admitted. The Court granted the petition, (signing the order for the same in open court).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.
